headline: ChatGPT updates Box, Notion, Linear, and Dropbox apps with new actions including write capabilities
why_missed: This is a same-week official product rollout that materially expands ChatGPT's enterprise app integration layer, including write actions for supported apps, and it is not reflected elsewhere in the digest.

headline: OpenAI adds a plugins directory to Codex for packaged workflows built from skills, apps, and MCP servers
why_missed: The digest covers consumer ChatGPT changes but misses this official Codex distribution update, which matters because it formalizes a reusable plugin ecosystem for OpenAI's coding agent product.

headline: ChatGPT unifies Google Docs, Sheets, and Slides connectors under a single Google Drive app
why_missed: This is a same-week integration change that simplifies enterprise file workflows in ChatGPT and likely slipped through because it appeared only in release notes rather than mainstream press coverage.

headline: ChatGPT begins converting long pasted text into attachments for paid users
why_missed: This is a smaller but real same-week product change affecting context management and document workflows for Plus, Pro, and Business users, and it is absent from the digest.

headline: Legacy GPT-4 API preview snapshots reach shutdown date as OpenAI pushes developers to GPT-5 and GPT-4.1
why_missed: The digest includes Sora shutdown coverage but misses this same-week API model lifecycle event, which is relevant to developers and enterprise users relying on older GPT-4 preview snapshots.
